ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exoplanets" (
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exoplanet */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exoplanet */,
  "light_years_from_earth" REAL /* Distance of the exoplanet from Earth in light years */,
  "planet_mass" REAL /* Mass of the exoplanet in Jupiters */,
  "stellar_magnitude" REAL /* Stellar magnitude of the exoplanet */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date the exoplanet was discovered */,
  "hyperlink" TEXT /* Hyperlink to the exoplanet's detailed page on NASA's Exoplanet Catalog */,
  "catalog_name" TEXT /* Name of the catalog in which the exoplanet is listed */,
  "alternate_names" TEXT /* Alternate names of the exoplanet */,
  "radius" REAL /* Radius of the exoplanet in Jupiter radii */,
  "surface_temperature" REAL /* Surface temperature of the exoplanet in Kelvin */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the exoplanet in billion years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exoplanet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stellar_info" (
  "stellar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star */,
  "stellar_name" TEXT /* Name of the star */,
  "stellar_mass" REAL /* Mass of the star in solar masses */,
  "stellar_type" TEXT /* Type of the star (e.g., Main Sequence, Red Giant) */,
  "stellar_radius" REAL /* Radius of the star in solar radii */,
  "stellar_surface_temperature" REAL /* Surface temperature of the star in Kelvin */,
  "stellar_age" REAL /* Age of the star in billion years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stellar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discovery_details" (
  "discovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discovery event */,
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet being discovered */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date the exoplanet was discovered */,
  "discovery_method" TEXT /* Method used to discover the exoplanet (e.g., Transit, Radial Velocity) */,
  "discovery_team" TEXT /* Team responsible for the discovery */,
  "instrument_used" TEXT /* Instrument used for the discovery */,
  "telescope_used" TEXT /* Telescope used for the discovery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discovery_details_exoplanet_id FOREIGN KEY ("exoplanet_id") REFERENCES exoplanets ("exoplanet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exoplanet_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet being described */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the exoplanet in Jupiters */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the exoplanet in Jupiter radii */,
  "orbital_period" REAL /* Orbital period of the exoplanet in days */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity of the exoplanet's orbit */,
  "semi_major_axis" REAL /* Semi-major axis of the exoplanet's orbit in AU */,
  "inclination" REAL /* Inclination of the exoplanet's orbit in degrees */,
  "longitude_of_ascending_node" REAL /* Longitude of the ascending node of the exoplanet's orbit in degrees */,
  "argument_of_periastron" REAL /* Argument of periastron of the exoplanet's orbit in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exoplanet_characteristics_exoplanet_id FOREIGN KEY ("exoplanet_id") REFERENCES exoplanets ("exoplanet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exoplanet_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exoplanet type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the exoplanet type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exoplanet type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exoplanet_type_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet being mapped */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exoplanet_type_mapping_exoplanet_id FOREIGN KEY ("exoplanet_id") REFERENCES exoplanets ("exoplanet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_exoplanet_id FOREIGN KEY ("exoplanet_id") REFERENCES exoplanets ("exoplanet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exoplanet_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet associated with the dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_url" TEXT /* URL of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exoplanet_datasets_exoplanet_id FOREIGN KEY ("exoplanet_id") REFERENCES exoplanets ("exoplanet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES exoplanet_datasets ("dataset_id")
)
